description_long: This house is a modern residential structure situated on a green lawn, accompanied by two adjacent flat-roofed buildings and a detached garage. The main house features a boxy, rectilinear design with large windows on the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof is flat, and the upper floor is partially open, revealing a contemporary interior layout. The property includes a driveway with parked cars and some landscaping elements such as small shrubs. The exterior color palette is primarily neutral, with white, beige, and black surfaces. The overall layout suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood setting with a focus on minimalism and functionality.
description: A modern, boxy house with large front windows, flat roof, and neutral colors, set on a green lawn with adjacent outbuildings and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house's large windows, driveway with cars, and adjacent flat-roofed buildings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the beige side wall of the main house, the green lawn, and the alignment of the outbuildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house and outbuildings, with minimal window openings and a clear view of the flat roofs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black rear facade of the main house, the driveway, and the arrangement of cars and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, asymmetrical placement elsewhere
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, flush with the facade, and a paved driveway with minimal decorative elements.
